texto: Pale winter sun Is beatin' the ground Why'm I throwin' away The best thing that I've found My young heart's in tatters and I'm sureThat it will be a long time healing It's so hard to see what I'm doing this forWhen loneliness is all that I'm feeling
explicacao: Citação de David Gray sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Pale winter sun Is beatin' the ground Why'm I throwin' away The best thing that I've found My you…” articula reflexao, loneliness, winter em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
